mapper.sql: id, dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort, is_default, status, remark, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_data (dict_type, dict_label, dict_value, sort, is_default, status, remark, deleted, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{dictType}, #{dictLabel}, #{dictValue}, #{sort}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET dict_type = #{dictType}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort = #{sort}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
